meta_description: Corgi puppies for sale in Singapore from $2,888 all-in. The honest part first: Corgis are not HDB-approved. Private housing? We'll match you. HDB? We'll show you alternatives.
h1: Corgi Puppies for Sale in Singapore

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop at 2 Balestier Road (licence AS24J00046) selling Corgi puppies at $2,888 to $4,488 all-in, with honest housing-fit advice first.

The Pembroke Welsh Corgi is a sturdy herding breed: 10 to 14 kg fully grown, short-legged but athletic, alert and affectionate, with a thick double coat that sheds heavily. In Singapore, Corgis are NOT on the HDB-approved list; they suit condos and landed homes.

faq.question: Can I keep a Corgi in an HDB flat?
faq.answer_direction: No; Corgis are not on the HDB-approved list, and we will not pretend otherwise. Condos and landed homes: yes, up to three dogs. HDB readers: see our approved alternatives.

faq.question: How much does a Corgi cost in Singapore?
faq.answer_direction: Market commonly $6,000 to $10,000; ours are $2,888 to $4,488 all-in with kit, delivery, setup and training.

faq.question: How bad is Corgi shedding?
faq.answer_direction: Real: a thick double coat sheds year-round with heavier seasonal blows; daily brushing in those weeks. Never shave the double coat.

faq.question: Do Corgis cope with Singapore heat?
faq.answer_direction: Yes with sense: early/late walks, water, aircon rest, and a lean weight; the double coat insulates both ways.

faq.question: Can a Corgi be alone during work hours?
faq.answer_direction: A settled adult can; a bored Corgi is loud and inventive. Exercise before you leave and food-puzzle jobs are non-negotiable.

faq.question: How much exercise does a Corgi need?
faq.answer_direction: 45 to 60 minutes daily plus mental work; it is a herding breed in a small body.

faq.question: What happens after I reserve?
faq.answer_direction: Deposit, free boarding, delivery around your schedule, setup + walkthrough, week-one training lesson.
